meaning: adj.盐腌的,盐味的,有经验的,(动物)有免疫力的
examples: A kipper is a whole herring fish that has been split from tail to head, salted, and smoked.
She salted away the profits in foreign bank accounts.
The fish or seafood is heavily salted with pure sodium chloride.
Roadside carts sell snacks and drinks, from fruit punch to arepas (corn cakes) and salted green mango.
For dessert, there was hot apple and huckleberry crisp with salted caramel ice cream.
